name: The Cleanup
author: Simon
description: Post-feature cleanup, config audit cascade, deep structural audit, multi-agent coordination for launch preparation

sub_phases.name: Repository Hygiene
sub_phases.theme: Documentation accuracy, remediation automation, launch prep

sub_phases.name: Config Audit Catalog
sub_phases.theme: Systematic enumeration of all configuration patterns, security issues, and gaps

sub_phases.name: Config Fixes
sub_phases.theme: Targeted corrections to highest-impact config issues

sub_phases.name: Deep Structural Audit
sub_phases.theme: Expanded audit: code duplication, error handling, god objects, dead code, documentation drift

key_events: Worktree isolation system enables multi-agent development (edecbca)
THE_BIBLE 2.1 with 19 subsystems, audit revealing 29% discrepancies (bef21ac, c2911d6)
Documentation remediation system: validation scripts, git hooks, CI workflow (c5d5559)
LLM isConfigured() bug fix affecting all non-p5 generators (c57e8ca)
Config audit cascade: 10 catalog commits in 11 minutes (0805200-0a13c21)
Config fixes: error alignment, env consolidation, Zod validation, secret redaction (0f194c3-e9c7f09)
Deep structural audit: 12 dimensions in 5 minutes (21e54cf-a42acb2)
Repository reorganization for GitHub launch (agent-kimi branch, unmerged)
Cross-agent audit: Claude Code, KimiCode, Kilocode comparison (foamy branch, unmerged)
4 concurrent AI agents across 4 worktrees (first multi-agent coordination in project history)

development_patterns.name: Audit Cascade
development_patterns.description: Three-step process: (1) Catalog every instance without judgment, (2) Fix highest-impact issues, (3) Expand scope to find systemic problems. New in Era 10.

development_patterns.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
development_patterns.description: 4 AI agents running in parallel worktrees, each with a distinct mission. Enabled by the worktree isolation system built in the first commit of this era.
development_patterns.evidence: edecbca enables the pattern; all 4 agents active Apr 2-3

development_patterns.name: Self-Validating Documentation
development_patterns.description: Automated scripts that verify documentation matches codebase reality. 29% discrepancy rate found on first run.

deep_audit.error_handling: 149 catch blocks, 2 bare catches, 47 console.warn, 21 console.error

fixes_applied: Error messages aligned with validation logic (0f194c3)
env() helpers consolidated into single module (7d31cf8)

worktree-foamy-kindling-crane.mission: Cross-agent AI tooling audit (Claude Code vs Kilocode vs KimiCode)

narrative_arc: The developer stops building features and turns critical attention to the project's structural integrity. A multi-day audit cascade catalogs configuration issues, fixes the highest-impact problems, then expands into deep structural analysis. Meanwhile, parallel AI agents handle repo reorganization and cross-agent tooling research. This is the first era of multi-agent coordination in the project's history -- 4 AI agents running simultaneously across 4 worktrees, each with a distinct mission. The worktree isolation system built in the era's first commit enables the pattern.
